REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BRAVADO NETWORK, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. BREACH OF CONSENT AGREEMENT IS SUFFICIENTLY STATED AND IS NOT UNCERTAIN. ISSUES OF FACT AS TO THE TERMINATION OF SUBLEASE OR DATE OF SUCH TERMINATION (TO THE EXTENT IT IS RELEVANT TO THE CONSENT AGREEMENT PROVIDING FOR PAYMENT OF RENTS UNDER THE SUBLEASE DIRECTLY TO THE LANDLORD) ARE IMPROPERLY RAISED ON THE DEMURRER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Continued To Jun-01-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2021 Continued To Feb-02-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT BRAVADO NETWORK, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Breach of Consent agreement is sufficiently stated and is not uncertain. Issues of fact as to the termination of sublease or date of such termination (to the extent it is relevant to the Consent agreement providing for payment of rents under the sublease directly to the landlord) are improperly raised on the demurrer.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
